Opportunity To Serve Company Ltd

Kigali's trusted supplier of construction aggregates — Kayumbu sand from water, crushed sand, and crushed stones of every size, delivered on time and measured to the cubic metre.

"Building Possibilities. Serving Futures."

General Settings

⚡ Enable Cross-Device Sync (Supabase)

Currently data is stored locally (this browser only). To make all changes visible to every user on any device after deploying online:

  1. Go to supabase.com → create a free project
  2. In your project: Settings → API → copy the Project URL and anon public key
  3. Open this HTML file in a text editor, find the two lines near the top of the JS:
    const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co';
    const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY';
  4. Replace the placeholder values with your actual credentials and re-deploy to GitHub/Vercel
  5. In Supabase SQL editor, run the table setup script (see below)
Show SQL Setup Script

Delivery Statuses

Account Recovery Contact

        
If a CEO or staff password is lost, anyone can reset it from the login screen only by correctly entering this email and phone number. Keep them safe.

        

          

          

        

        
      

    


    
    

      
About Us

      

        
Our Vision
To be East Africa's most trusted name in construction aggregates, building the foundations of tomorrow's cities.

        
Our Mission
To deliver reliable, quality sand and stone aggregates to every site, on time and at fair prices, while creating opportunity for our people.

        
Our Values
Integrity. Reliability. Service. Growth. Community. Every load we deliver carries our name and our word.

      

      

        
Our Partnerships

        
We work hand in hand with contractors, developers, and local suppliers across Kigali to keep every project moving.
